calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, ZLATA SOKOLOVA

Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Minor Zlata Sokolova.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:19 am. and concluding at 10:24 am.

Petitioner Mila Averon appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name of minor filed October 03, 2024.

Order to show cause filed October 03, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed November 13, 2024.

Proof of Publication filed November 07, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name of Minor.
